changes: Omi Beta now uses the same reliable production backend as Omi while keeping its separate Beta app and update channel
Chat now decides for itself how much to think: typed questions get adaptive reasoning (ask it to think longer and it will), while push-to-talk stays speed-optimized
Improved the privacy and noise controls for Beta Enhanced Diagnostics.
Beta builds now collect additional bounded technical diagnostics by default to help resolve reliability issues faster. You can disable Enhanced Diagnostics in Settings → Advanced.
Fixed a release-pipeline check that blocked the first side-by-side Omi Beta build from publishing

Redesigned Home: chat with your history is now the home surface, with a '2nd brain' greeting plus suggested task, insight, and question rows for new accounts, glanceable stats in the header, and a quieter chat timeline
The floating bar no longer has a typed input — the Open Omi shortcut (formerly Ask Omi) now brings up the Omi app, and voice answers offer a one-click Continue in Omi
